creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Could you update your ports collection?
Current version for sysutils/openipmi is 2.0.19 and make install package
works fine:

[root@blackbox /usr/ports/sysutils/openipmi]# make depends
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.14.1 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.14.1 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on shared library: popt.0 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on shared library: execinfo.1 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on executable: swig - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.7 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on executable: gmake - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.14.1 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/automake-1.11 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/autoconf-2.68 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on package: libtool>=2.4 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on executable: pkg-config - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.7 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.14.1 - found
===>   openipmi-2.0.19 depends on executable: pkg-config - found

full log for build package: http://deiter.ru/openipmi.txt


Thanks!

-- 
Alex Deiter
